html:
2026-0501
2026-05-28DFOFisheries ActRegulations Amending the Aquatic Invasive Species Regulations Regulations Amending the Aquatic Invasive Species Regulations in order to (1) enable the persons designated under the Regulations to authorize the deposit of any substances identified on the labels of pest control products, when used in conjunction with such products; (2) provide authorization to take enforcement action in the event of non-compliance with directions specified on authorizations for the deposit of deleterious substances to control or eradicate aquatic invasive species (AIS); (3) permit the designated persons to amend, suspend or cancel an authorization that they already issued; and (4) amend and replace two minor references to the provincial titles for Ministers responsible for managing and controlling AIS.Registration: SOR/2026-0093 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Regulations Amending the Aquatic Invasive Species Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Aquatic Invasive Species Regulations in order to (1) enable the persons designated under the Regulations to authorize the deposit of any substances identified on the labels of pest control products, when used in conjunction with such products; (2) provide authorization to take enforcement action in the event of non-compliance with directions specified on authorizations for the deposit of deleterious substances to control or eradicate aquatic invasive species (AIS); (3) permit the designated persons to amend, suspend or cancel an authorization that they already issued; and (4) amend and replace two minor references to the provincial titles for Ministers responsible for managing and controlling AIS.
